field.filter: SELECT PowerConnection WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id AND finalclass IN ('PowerSource','PowerTransform','UPS','PowerSourceInverter','PowerGeneralBoard','PowerDistributionUnit')

SELECT PowerConnection WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id AND finalclass IN ('PowerSource','PowerTransform','UPS','PowerSourceInverter','PowerGeneralBoard','PowerDistributionUnit')
SELECT PowerDistributionUnit WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id
SELECT PowerDistributionUnit WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id
SELECT PowerConnection WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id
SELECT PowerConnection WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id
SELECT PowerConnection WHERE id != :this->id AND location_id = :this->location_id

neighbour.query_down: SELECT DatacenterDevice WHERE powerA_id = :this->id OR powerB_id = :this->id
neighbour.query_up: SELECT PowerConnection WHERE id = :this->powerA_id OR id = :this->powerB_id

neighbour.query_down: SELECT PowerSourceInverter WHERE powerA_id = :this->id OR powerB_id = :this->id
neighbour.query_up: SELECT PowerConnection WHERE id = :this->powerA_id OR id = :this->powerB_id

neighbour.query_down: SELECT PowerDistributionUnit WHERE powerA_id = :this->id OR powerB_id = :this->id
neighbour.query_up: SELECT PowerConnection WHERE id = :this->powerA_id OR id = :this->powerB_id
